THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUBOTA, JOSEPH Y. AKA JOSEPH Y. KUBOTO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 156 COOK ST, SF, CA $2,666.40 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,666.40, LEASE FORFEITED
